actions.value:
Thank you for providing this information to authenticate yourself as the account owner.

 

I've escalated the case internally and will update you as soon as we have amended the lockout timer to the minimum of 7 days (for your current device only). For future reference, once you're back into your account, you can obtain and secure the 2FA Backup code for your account, and use it to authenticate yourself and bypass this IP lockout timer on any unrecognized device, without needing our help.
